description_long: This object is a realistic model of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a mottled brown and cream coloration. The crab has two large, prominent claws (chelae) raised upwards, each with a robust, slightly curved structure and a pale, off-white hue. Its eight walking legs are slender, jointed, and taper to pointed tips, with subtle brown markings near the joints and tips. The carapace displays a smooth, hard texture with a subtle sheen, and the underside is lighter in color. The eyes are small, dark, and positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace. No antennae are visible, and the overall appearance suggests a marine crustacean commonly found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A detailed crab with a mottled brown and cream carapace, large raised claws, and eight slender, jointed legs. The surface is hard and slightly glossy, with small eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad carapace, both large claws raised, and all eight legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the carapace, the profile of one claw, and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the claws from behind, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other claw in profile and the curvature of the body and legs.
